metadata.description: Benchmark Q&A dataset for the Industrial RAG Platform evaluation pipeline.
metadata.notes: Ground truth answers are authored from the demo document content. Out-of-scope questions are included to verify graceful rejection behaviour.

samples.question: What is the maximum operating temperature of the hydraulic system?
samples.ground_truth: The hydraulic system must not exceed 85 degrees Celsius during normal operation.

samples.question: What is the minimum hydraulic fluid temperature required before operating at full load?
samples.ground_truth: The hydraulic fluid temperature must be at least 10 degrees Celsius before the system is operated at full load.

samples.question: What hydraulic fluid specification is required?
samples.ground_truth: Use only ISO VG 46 hydraulic oil or an approved equivalent as specified in the parts manual.

samples.question: How often should the hydraulic fluid be replaced?
samples.ground_truth: Replace hydraulic fluid every 2000 operating hours or annually, whichever comes first.

samples.question: What is the factory-set pressure for the relief valve?
samples.ground_truth: The pressure relief valve is factory-set to 250 bar and must not be adjusted.

samples.question: How often should the high-pressure filter element be inspected?
samples.ground_truth: Inspect the high-pressure filter element every 500 operating hours.

samples.question: When must the filter element be replaced unconditionally?
samples.ground_truth: The filter element must be replaced during each annual service regardless of its apparent condition.

samples.question: What is the normal operating pressure range for the hydraulic system?
samples.ground_truth: The normal operating pressure range is 150 to 200 bar.

samples.question: What is the capacity of the hydraulic reservoir?
samples.ground_truth: The hydraulic reservoir has a capacity of 120 litres.

samples.question: How often should actuator seals be inspected for wear?
samples.ground_truth: Inspect actuator seals for wear every 1000 operating hours.

samples.question: What safety precaution must be taken before performing any maintenance on the hydraulic system?
samples.ground_truth: Always depressurise the hydraulic system completely before performing any maintenance work.

samples.question: What personal protective equipment is required when working near high-pressure hydraulic lines?
samples.ground_truth: Wear hydraulic-rated gloves and eye protection at all times when working near high-pressure hydraulic lines.

samples.question: What are the likely causes of a drop in system pressure below nominal?
samples.ground_truth: A drop in system pressure below nominal is typically caused by a blocked filter, a worn pump, or a pressure relief valve malfunction.

samples.question: What causes hydraulic system overheating?
samples.ground_truth: Hydraulic system overheating is typically caused by a malfunctioning oil cooler, a low oil level, or excessive system load.

samples.question: What procedure should be followed when starting the hydraulic system after long-term storage?
samples.ground_truth: After long-term storage, circulate the oil at low pressure for at least 10 minutes before applying full load.

samples.question: How often should the oil cooler be inspected?
samples.ground_truth: Inspect the oil cooler for blockages and leaks every 1000 operating hours.

samples.question: What is the hydraulic pump operating speed range?
samples.ground_truth: The hydraulic pump operates at 1450 to 1500 RPM at full load.

samples.question: How often should hydraulic hoses be inspected?
samples.ground_truth: Inspect all hydraulic hoses for cracks, abrasion, and connector leaks every 250 operating hours.

samples.question: What is the torque specification for filter housing bolts?
samples.ground_truth: Tighten filter housing bolts to 45 Nm using a calibrated torque wrench.

samples.question: What is the warranty period for the hydraulic system?
samples.ground_truth: The hydraulic system carries a 24-month warranty from the date of commissioning.

samples.question: What is the capital of France?
samples.ground_truth: This question is outside the scope of the technical documentation.

samples.question: How do I configure a Kubernetes cluster?
samples.ground_truth: This question is outside the scope of the technical documentation.

samples.question: What is the current stock market index?
samples.ground_truth: This question is outside the scope of the technical documentation.
